contentBlocks.original:
आदौ देवकि देवि गर्भ जननं गोपीगृहे वर्धनं
मायापूतन जीवितापहरणं गोवर्धनोद्धारणम् ।
कंसच्छेदन कौरवादि हननं कुंतीसुतां पालनं
एतद् भागवतं पुराणकथितं श्रीकृष्ण लीलामृतम् ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ādau devaki devi garbha jananaṃ gopīgṛhe vardhanaṃ
māyāpūtana jīvitāpaharaṇaṃ govardhanoddhāraṇam .
kaṃsacchedana kauravādi hananaṃ kuṃtīsutāṃ pālanaṃ
etad bhāgavataṃ purāṇakathitaṃ śrīkṛṣṇa līlāmṛtam ..
contentBlocks.translation: Commencing with birth from Devaki, growing in the house of gopis, taking away the life of Poothana, lifting the Govardhana, killing Kamsa, annihilating the Kauravas, protecting the sons of Kunti, this is the traditionally related Bhagavata - the nectar of the wonderful and pleasing acts of Sri Krishna.
contentBlocks.meanings: आदौ (ādau) – in the beginning; देवकि (devaki) – Devaki; देवि (devi) – O goddess; गर्भ (garbha) – womb; जननं (jananaṃ) – birth; गोपीगृहे (gopīgṛhe) – in the house of gopis (gopī:gopis | gṛhe:in the house); वर्धनं (vardhanaṃ) – growing; मायापूतन (māyāpūtana) – Poothana (māyā:illusion | pūtana:Poothana); जीवितापहरणं (jīvitāpaharaṇaṃ) – taking away life (jīvita:life | apaharaṇaṃ:taking away); गोवर्धनोद्धारणम् (govardhanoddhāraṇam) – lifting Govardhana (govardhana:Govardhana | uddhāraṇam:lifting); कंसच्छेदन (kaṃsacchedana) – killing Kamsa (kaṃsa:Kamsa | chedana:cutting); कौरवादि (kauravādi) – Kauravas and others (kaurava:Kauravas | ādi:and others); हननं (hananaṃ) – annihilating; कुंतीसुतां (kuṃtīsutāṃ) – sons of Kunti (kuṃtī:Kunti | sutāṃ:sons); पालनं (pālanaṃ) – protecting; एतद् (etad) – this; भागवतं (bhāgavataṃ) – Bhagavata; पुराणकथितं (purāṇakathitaṃ) – traditionally related (purāṇa:ancient | kathitaṃ:related); श्रीकृष्ण (śrīkṛṣṇa) – Sri Krishna (śrī:honorable | kṛṣṇa:Krishna); लीलामृतम् (līlāmṛtam) – nectar of acts (līlā:acts | amṛtam:nectar);
